info.title: SlipStream
info.description: Real-time social driving network for car enthusiasts.

post.description:
Create a new user account and return tokens.

Signup collects only email + password; the username is a temp handle the
user replaces during onboarding (unless a client explicitly supplies one).

Exchange Apple identity token for SlipStream tokens.

This endpoint:
1. Fetches Apple's JWKS (cached for 1 hour)
2. Validates the identity token signature and claims
3. Finds or creates a user by apple_id
4. Issues access and refresh tokens
5. Returns is_new_user=true for first-time users
Authenticate with email (or username) and password, return tokens.

Exchange a valid refresh token for new access + refresh tokens.

This implements token rotation — the old refresh token is revoked
and a new one is issued.
Revoke the provided refresh token (sign out).

get.description:
Check whether a username is available for the current user to claim.

Validates format and length, then checks uniqueness (case-insensitive).
The caller's own current username is always reported available so a
pre-filled handle during onboarding doesn't read as "taken".
Get the current user's full profile.

delete.description: Delete the current user's account and all associated data.

patch.description: Update the current user's profile fields.

get.description: List all cars in the current user's garage.

post.description:
Add a new car to the garage.

If this is the user's first car, it becomes the active car automatically.

delete.description:
Remove a car from the garage.

Cannot delete the last car — users must always have at least one.
If deleting the active car, another car is auto-activated.

post.description: Set a car as the active car (shown on map and in profile).
Send a friend request to another user.
Accept an incoming friend request.
Decline an incoming friend request.
Create a new convoy. The creator becomes the leader.

get.description: Get convoy details with member list.

post.description: End the convoy (leader only). Dissolves it for everyone.
Join a convoy directly (friend's convoy or accepted invite).
Request to join a public convoy.
Accept a join request (leader only).
Decline a join request (leader only).
Leave the convoy.
Invite a user to the convoy (any member can invite).
Remove a member from the convoy (leader only).

get.description: Get recent messages in the convoy chat (paginated, newest last).

post.description: Send a text message in the convoy chat.
Send a quick action alert to the convoy.
Set a group route for the convoy (any member can set).

get.description: Get the current active route for the convoy.

Return spatial system configuration for clients.

Clients use this to know which H3 resolutions are supported
and should be used for viewport cell computation.
Dump the full state of the in-memory spatial store. Only available when DEBUG=true.

AppleAuthRequest.title: AppleAuthRequest
AppleAuthRequest.description: Request body for Apple Sign In.

AppleAuthResponse.title: AppleAuthResponse
AppleAuthResponse.description: Response for Apple Sign In, extends TokenResponse with is_new_user flag.

FullName.title: FullName
FullName.description: Name components from Apple Sign In.

Waypoint.title: Waypoint
Waypoint.description: A single waypoint along a route.
